arts.ttl: North Macedonia v Wales LIVE: Kick-off time, TV channel and score updates
arts.sum: Follow live updates as Wales take on North Macedonia in the second game of their World Cup qualifying campaign

After comfortable victories for both sides in their opening World Cup qualifiers, North Macedonia host Wales on Tuesday evening. The home side kicked off their qualifying campaign with a 3-0 victory ...
